title.en: Just after the Worm King caught up for a while,...

content.en:
The Worm King is almost invincible, and all the Dao Ancestors who are hunted down by it have almost no way to escape, and they are all killed and devoured by it one by one.

Just after the Worm King caught up for a while, a figure stopped the Worm King.

This person was dressed in a black robe and a white mask, and slapped the insect king away with one hand, showing extremely terrifying combat power.

"It's a pity, it's just a stunted insect king, if you are the real insect king, I am still afraid of you!"

The man spoke.

Roar!

The insect king was furious and killed the man.

However, no matter how it attacked, it could not hurt the man in the slightest, and the man's casual blow could hurt it.

Its carapace, which claimed to surpass the defense of the third-step half-step domain ancestor, gradually began to crack, and purple blood flowed out, spilling into the void.

The wisdom of the insect king is not low, knowing that he is not a man's opponent, he is ready to escape.

However, as soon as the man pointed out, this void seemed to be separated from the outside world, completely separated from the outside world, and no matter how the insect king escaped, he couldn't escape here.

"Don't run away, this is my forbidden Dao technique - Infinite Void, unless you have the attack method of the domain ancestor level to break here, you will never be able to leave here!" the man said lightly.

Abrupt.

A forbidden spear was directly condensed by the man, carrying a terrifying taboo rule to descend.

Bang!

The insect king was knocked away by a blow, and the carapace on his body directly cracked, and a small hole appeared.

In this way, the insect king was constantly beaten, and after a while, he was injured a lot.

"Don't worry, I won't kill you, a living Forbidden Worm King is worth much more than a dead Forbidden Worm King. If you hand over your soul origin, I won't kill you!" the man said.

However, the Worm King is not afraid of death at all, so naturally he will not hand over the soul origin.

I saw that it attacked the man angrily, and refused to surrender even though he was seriously injured.

Seeing this, the man sighed: "Okay, I can only hit you hard first, and then slowly subdue you!"

Rumble!!!

The man turned into a giant with a body of hundreds of millions of feet, and immediately performed a boxing forbidden dao technique, and punched the forbidden insect king.

With a bang, the void exploded, and the Forbidden Insect King was hit hard by a punch, and his body flew upside down for hundreds of thousands of miles.

Immediately, the man's giant hand suddenly pinched the Forbidden Insect King, and the terrifying force pinched the Forbidden Insect King's body continued to crack, and his breath became weaker and weaker.

When the Forbidden Insect King's aura weakened to a certain extent and there was almost no way to resist, the man took out a sealing treasure, preparing to seal the Forbidden Insect King into it and then take it away.

But at this moment, a ray of light pierced through the void.

Bang!

The man reached out to block the light attack, but a small bloody hole was punched in the palm of his hand.

You must know that the Forbidden Insect King's attacks did not cause him any damage, but the unknown attack broke his defense, which shows that the enemy's strength is not weak.

Wow!

The man looked into the void in the distance, where a man shrouded in mist appeared, looking at the man.

"Half-step Domain Ancestor at the limit of the Returning One Realm, who are you, the breath is very unfamiliar, I haven't even heard of it!"

The man spoke.

The half-step domain ancestor of the second step is generally called the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and the physical body of all things or the forbidden path of all things realm is not the real half-step domain ancestor of all things, only when the physical body and the forbidden path all step into the realm of all things, it is called the half-step domain ancestor of the ten thousand things realm.

But if you have reached the third step, the realm of all things in the physical body and the realm of all things in the forbidden path have all reached the ultimate perfection level, and this realm is called the oneness of all things, and it is called the half-step domain ancestor of the oneness realm.

If the physical body and the forbidden path are completely fused, the forbidden body reaches ten percent perfection, and the true meaning of the domain ancestor is mastered, then it can impact into the domain ancestor level.

In fact, any half-step domain ancestor who cultivated step by step, slowly boiling through endless years, would be able to enter the domain ancestor level, but some half-step domain ancestors would take too long to wait for themselves.

Not every half-step Domain Ancestor can survive slowly, so many Half-Step Domain Ancestors also want to find an opportunity to accelerate their cultivation and cultivate to the Unified Realm as soon as possible, so that they can impact the Domain Ancestor level.

And this mysterious person shrouded in mist was a half-step domain ancestor who had been perfected to the limit of unification, and he was only one step away from the domain ancestor level.

The other party is only the fusion of the forbidden path and the physical body, or the forbidden body has not yet reached ten percent perfection, or it has not yet mastered the true meaning of the domain ancestor.

In short, the other party must have missed one condition, so he did not step into the Domain Ancestor level.

But such a Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor must have had a great reputation, but it was difficult to identify who it was.

After all, if the years are too long, they haven't come out for a long time, who knows who they are?

The mysterious man looked at the masked man and said with a smile: "Your Excellency should be the Wind Mountain Lord of Black Wind Mountain, right?"

The masked man, that is, the Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain, was surprised: "I didn't expect you to know me, could it be that you are someone from the Heavenly Emperor Palace?" No, the Heavenly Emperor Palace should not have a half-step domain ancestor like you, and even the vast sea ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace may not know about the situation of our Black Wind Mountain." "

"I didn't say that I came from the Heavenly Emperor Palace!" the mysterious man sneered: "The Heavenly Emperor Palace is indeed very powerful, but it is only the strength of the Vast Sea Ancestor, the foundation of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is still a little worse, before the rise of the Vast Sea Ancestor, the Heavenly Emperor Palace is just an ordinary Nine Heavens Force, and it is not as strong as your Black Wind Mountain heritage." The vast sea ancestor is also too greedy, and the things he wants to seek are too big, and the step is too big, so he provokes many domain ancestors to make a move. He thought that by throwing a third of the Realm Fragments into the Dark Forbidden Realm, he would be able to carry out his plan by taking a gamble. But he didn't know how powerful the existence was to sneak into the Domain Fragment, Wind Mountain Lord, you could have easily left the Domain Fragment, I'm afraid you also knew that this Domain Fragment could find a new realm, otherwise how would you dare to go deep into the Dark Forbidden Domain so easily?"

"So, isn't Your Excellency the Heavenly Emperor Palace's Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor?" said with a smile from the Wind Mountain Lord, "One thing you are not wrong about, I do know that the Domain Boundary Fragment can find a new Realm, otherwise I would not dare to take the Wind Mountain on the adventure." You must know this, or you wouldn't have said that. I wonder if you know the origin of the treasure that was fused into the Realm Fragment?"

"I don't know!" said the mysterious man, "I only know that the treasure can find a realm in the Dark Forbidden Realm and evolve the world, and once the world evolves into a forbidden realm, it will continue to devour a realm and evolve into a world that is unprecedentedly large." The Divine Heaven Realm was too powerful, and the Vast Sea Ancestor did not dare to do so in the Divine Heaven Realm, otherwise he would be killed by some ancient Domain Ancestor before he could complete his plan. That's why he tried to venture out to find another realm and carry out his plan. But it's a pity that there should be many people who know about this plan, and he is destined to be busy in vain!"

"Hahaha, how do you know that he will be busy in vain?" The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain said with a smile: "The hole cards and the back hand left by the Ancestor of the Great Sea Sea, you and I don't know. Moreover, the taboo realm is one, the Heavenly Emperor Palace is positioned, and if the ancestor of the vast sea has not fallen, he will definitely find it. At that time, he will control this place, and it will not be a problem. After all, he is a great power in the late stage of a domain ancestor, not a new domain ancestor who has just entered the domain ancestor!"

The mysterious man did not deny it, but nodded: "What you said is right, we do know the backhand of the Haohai Sea Ancestor, but I know very well that you Black Wind Mountain also have your own plans in this matter, and even the Haohai Sea Ancestor got that treasure, and the news was also leaked by you, after all, you Black Wind Mountain can't deal with the Haohai Sea Ancestor, you can only use other domain ancestors, and even you know more secrets than me." "

"We don't admit it!" denied the Wind Mountain Lord.

"Hahaha, it doesn't matter if you don't admit it, I'm not an enemy of you this time. The mysterious man said: "I want half of the blood and part of the body of this insect king, and if a insect king loses this blood and body, he will not die, or will it grow, this request is not too much, right?"

"Not too much!"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain agreed.

Immediately, he directly cut off half of the body of the insect king and handed it to the mysterious man.

Then, the mysterious man left.

Seeing the mysterious person disappearing, the Lord of Fengshan couldn't help frowning: "It's not from the Heavenly Emperor Palace, could it be those domain ancestors?"

Of course, it is also possible that the half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace deliberately said so.

In short, the situation in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is becoming more and more complicated now.

......

In the distance, the mysterious man looked in the direction of the Wind Mountain Lord and muttered: "The strength of the Wind Mountain Lord is very strong, I almost hit hard, but I only broke his defense, but I didn't hurt him much, and his strength is infinitely close to the half-step domain ancestor of the limit level of the Returning One Realm." And, is this his essence or not?"

It is rumored that the Lord of Wind Mountain is the Domain Ancestor, but it doesn't seem to be today.

But what if this is the doppelganger of the Wind Mountain Lord?

"Wind Mountain Lord, we will meet again in the future!"

The mysterious man escaped into the void and disappeared completely.
